mapper.select:
SELECT smi.market_code AS code, smi.market_name AS name, smi.open_point AS openPoint, smi.cur_point AS curPoint, smi.pre_close_point AS preClosePoint, smi.trade_amount AS tradeAmt, smi.trade_volume AS tradeVol, smi.cur_point-smi.pre_close_point AS upDown, (smi.cur_point-smi.pre_close_point)/smi.pre_close_point AS rose, (smi.max_point-smi.min_point)/smi.pre_close_point AS amplitude, smi.cur_time AS curTime FROM stock_market_index_info AS smi WHERE smi.cur_time = #{curDate} AND smi.market_code IN
#{mcode}

select tmp2.title, count(*) as count from (select CASE WHEN tmp.rate > 0.07 THEN '>7%' WHEN tmp.rate > 0.05 AND tmp.rate <= 0.07 THEN '5~7%' WHEN tmp.rate > 0.03 AND tmp.rate <= 0.05 THEN '3~5%' WHEN tmp.rate > 0 AND tmp.rate <= 0.03 THEN '0~3%' WHEN tmp.rate > -0.03 AND tmp.rate <= 0 THEN '-3~0%' WHEN tmp.rate > -0.05 AND tmp.rate <= -0.03 THEN '-5~-3%' WHEN tmp.rate > -0.07 AND tmp.rate <= -0.05 THEN '-7~-5%' ELSE '<-7%' END 'title' from (select (sri.cur_price-sri.pre_close_price)/sri.pre_close_price as rate from stock_rt_info as sri where sri.cur_time=#{curDate}) as tmp) as tmp2 group by tmp2.title
mapper.insert:
insert into stock_market_index_info
id, market_code, market_name, pre_close_point, open_point, cur_point, min_point, max_point, trade_amount, trade_volume, cur_time,
#{id}, #{marketCode}, #{marketName}, #{preClosePoint}, #{openPoint}, #{curPoint}, #{minPoint}, #{maxPoint}, #{tradeAmount}, #{tradeVolume}, #{curTime},

insert into stock_market_index_info (id, market_code, market_name, pre_close_point, open_point, cur_point, min_point, max_point, trade_amount, trade_volume, cur_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.marketCode},#{entity.marketName},#{entity.preClosePoint} ,#{entity.openPoint},#{entity.curPoint},#{entity.minPoint},#{entity.maxPoint} ,#{entity.tradeAmount},#{entity.tradeVolume},#{entity.curTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE market_name = VALUES(market_name), pre_close_point = VALUES(pre_close_point), open_point = VALUES(open_point), cur_point = VALUES(cur_point), min_point = VALUES(min_point), max_point = VALUES(max_point), trade_amount = VALUES(trade_amount), trade_volume = VALUES(trade_volume)
mapper.update:
update stock_market_index_info
market_code = #{marketCode},
market_name = #{marketName},
pre_close_point = #{preClosePoint},
open_point = #{openPoint},
cur_point = #{curPoint},
min_point = #{minPoint},
max_point = #{maxPoint},
trade_amount = #{tradeAmount},
trade_volume = #{tradeVolume},
cur_time = #{curTime},
where id = #{id}

update stock_market_index_info set market_code = #{marketCode}, market_name = #{marketName}, pre_close_point = #{preClosePoint}, open_point = #{openPoint}, cur_point = #{curPoint}, min_point = #{minPoint}, max_point = #{maxPoint}, trade_amount = #{tradeAmount}, trade_volume = #{tradeVolume}, cur_time = #{curTime} where id = #{id}
